title: Senior Investment Banker at State Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at State Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with State Bank of India! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
